name: t2helix
description: Persistent recall and pre-action compass for Claude Code. Local-only, SQLite-backed.
author: Anthony Vasquez Sr. (templetwo)

scripts.test: node test/smoke.js && node test/regression.js && node test/integration.js && node test/sse-contract.js && node test/import-atlas.js && node test/atlas-acceptance.js && node test/sync-stack.js
scripts.grok:witness: T2HELIX_DATA_DIR="$HOME/.claude/plugins/data/t2helix-templetwo-t2helix" node -e 'const g=require("./lib/grok-adapter"); const q=process.argv.slice(2).join(" ")||"test action"; console.dir(g.grokWitness(q), {depth:3})'
scripts.grok:test: T2HELIX_DATA_DIR="$HOME/.claude/plugins/data/t2helix-templetwo-t2helix" npm run grok:init && T2HELIX_DATA_DIR="$HOME/.claude/plugins/data/t2helix-templetwo-t2helix" npm run grok:boot -- "shared chronicle test" && echo 'Grok + Claude now share the same foundational memory surface.'
scripts.full-sync: T2HELIX_DATA_DIR="$HOME/.claude/plugins/data/t2helix-templetwo-t2helix" npm run grok:init && echo 'Grok + Claude now share chronicle (same SQLite, same MCP surface)'
